retrieved_result: Mystic Eyes of Death Perception "Screenshot from the first Kara no Kyoukai movie, showing Shiki Ryougi's activated Mystic Eyes. The Mystic Eyes of Death Perception ( 直死の魔眼, Chokushi no Magan?, Mystic Eyes of Direct Death) are a type of Mystic Eyes that are considered to be such a rarity that they are thought not to exist at all. U
